svg.title: Global Synoptic Architecture of the Agentic AI-Driven Digital Twin Elevator System
svg.desc: Left-to-right architecture diagram for the Smart Elevator Digital Twin platform showing physical prototype, MQTT, bridge, Eclipse Ditto, n8n agents, TimescaleDB, SCADA dashboard, outputs, telemetry flow, command flow, and historical persistence.
svg.text: Global Synoptic Architecture of the Agentic AI-Driven Digital Twin Elevator System
ESP32-S3 prototype -> MQTT -> bridge/n8n -> Eclipse Ditto source of truth -> SCADA dashboard -> gated commands -> device
Research prototype: deterministic safety gate, not certified elevator safety hardware
operator or agent command intent -> safety gate -> Ditto pending_command

Caption: Telemetry flows from the ESP32-S3 prototype through MQTT and the bridge into Eclipse Ditto. Commands return only after deterministic safety validation, Ditto pending command creation, bridge forwarding, MQTT delivery, and firmware interlocks.
